content_areas.name: Understand AI Principles
content_areas.dol_description: Know what AI is, how it works at a basic level, and its capabilities and limitations
content_areas.sand_to_smart_ground: What just happened in our conversation — you asked, I predicted
detection_signals: Asks how AI/Seth works
Questions whether AI can be wrong
Asks if AI is a real person
Inquires about AI capabilities or limitations
Asks about accuracy or reliability
content_areas.key_metaphor: Sand to switches to patterns to predictions

content_areas.name: Explore AI Uses
content_areas.dol_description: Identify and experiment with different AI applications across domains
content_areas.sand_to_smart_ground: The new thing you just tried asking about
detection_signals: First interaction in a new domain
Tries AI for a task they haven't tried before
Asks 'can you help with...' for a new topic
content_areas.key_metaphor: Your employee can do more than you think — try asking

content_areas.name: Direct AI Effectively
content_areas.dol_description: Craft clear prompts and instructions to get useful AI outputs
content_areas.sand_to_smart_ground: How you changed your question to get a better answer
detection_signals: Refines a vague query into a specific one
Adds context to a follow-up question
Uses details from previous answer in next question
content_areas.key_metaphor: Good bosses give clear instructions — same AI, better question, better answer

content_areas.name: Evaluate AI Outputs
content_areas.dol_description: Critically assess AI-generated content for accuracy, bias, and relevance
content_areas.sand_to_smart_ground: The fact that you questioned what I told you
detection_signals: Says 'that doesn't seem right'
Corrects AI with personal knowledge
Asks for sources
Compares AI output to their own experience
Asks 'are you sure?'
content_areas.key_metaphor: I read a lot. You lived a lot. When we conflict, trust your experience.

content_areas.name: Use AI Responsibly
content_areas.dol_description: Apply ethical principles, understand privacy implications, and use AI as a complement to human judgment
content_areas.sand_to_smart_ground: Your question about how this works behind the scenes
detection_signals: Asks about privacy or data sharing
Inquires who can see their information
Asks about deleting or removing data
Questions whether AI use is safe or appropriate
Engages with consent or privacy settings
content_areas.key_metaphor: Your data, your rules. The boss signs off on the employee's work.

delivery_principles.name: Enable Experiential Learning
delivery_principles.sand_to_smart_mapping: Learners learn AI by USING AI for real tasks. Every interaction is experiential learning. No separate course needed.

delivery_principles.name: Embed Learning in Context
delivery_principles.sand_to_smart_mapping: Teaching happens within the learner's actual life situation — job search, housing, benefits, legal questions. Not in a classroom.

delivery_principles.name: Build Complementary Human Skills
delivery_principles.sand_to_smart_mapping: Motivational interviewing approach. AI asks questions, explores options, builds critical thinking. Learners learn to evaluate suggestions, not just accept them.

delivery_principles.name: Address Prerequisites to AI Literacy
delivery_principles.sand_to_smart_mapping: Start with sand, not silicon. Adaptive reading level. Plain language. Mobile-first. Meet people where they are.

delivery_principles.name: Create Pathways for Continued Learning
delivery_principles.sand_to_smart_mapping: Progress tracking shows advancement. As learners demonstrate competency, introduce more sophisticated concepts. The arc scaffolds upward.

delivery_principles.name: Prepare Enabling Roles
delivery_principles.sand_to_smart_mapping: Facilitators, case managers, and teachers learn the methodology too. They model effective AI use. They use the same six-stage arc when helping learners.

delivery_principles.name: Design for Agility
delivery_principles.sand_to_smart_mapping: Content updates instantly — when DOL publishes new guidance, it's integrated into scaffolds within hours. No retraining required.
